advisory_pre_existing.finding: Chinese text in BLOCKED stderr message: '必须使用正常的UI流程创建session，永远不允许使用代码创建session！' — user-visible diagnostic strings must be English with task-id attribution per Standard 6
advisory_pre_existing.recommendation: Replace with English: 'BLOCKED: Sessions must be created through the normal UI flow; never create sessions using code.' Add task-id attribution if verbatim text must be preserved in docs/dev/ticket-*.md
advisory_pre_existing.diff_scope: pre-existing — not introduced by this diff, file not in --changed-files list; advisory only per AC-2.6(b)

advisory_pre_existing.finding: Chinese characters in grep pattern used as detection logic: '以前|原本' — in-code logic (not a verbatim user-binding quote) must be English
advisory_pre_existing.recommendation: Replace Chinese alternatives with English-only equivalents, e.g. 'previously|before'. If detection of Chinese user input is intentional, add a comment in English explaining the purpose.
advisory_pre_existing.diff_scope: pre-existing — not introduced by this diff, file not in --changed-files list; advisory only per AC-2.6(b)

advisory_pre_existing.finding: Chinese text in Python docstring comment: '全部commit push' — code comments must be English with task-id attribution if preserving verbatim user input
advisory_pre_existing.recommendation: Paraphrase as 'prompt: commit and push everything' with a task-id attribution referencing where the verbatim Chinese prompt is preserved (docs/dev/ticket-*.md)
advisory_pre_existing.diff_scope: pre-existing — not introduced by this diff, file not in --changed-files list; advisory only per AC-2.6(b)

standard6_scan.scope_note: Unconditional Standard 6 scan per spec exception ran against agents/*.md and commands/*.md only (the defined unconditional-scan exception scope). Hook files (hooks/*.sh, hooks/*.py) scanned as part of full Standard 6 scope but classified as pre-existing/out-of-diff-scope under --changed-files mode.

standard11_scan.note: 17 files with merge conflict markers found. All are either under docs/ (excluded from style inspector scope) or in pre-existing non-changed files (hooks/*, scripts/*, tests/*, skills/*). None were introduced by the --changed-files diff. Advisory for next full-repo cycle.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex identified four pre-existing CJK violations in hook files (pretool-bash-safety.sh:1233, pretool-bisect-gate.sh:24, pretool-git-privilege-guard.py:11, userprompt-consent-allowlist.sh:45) that the initial scan missed. Codex proposed adding these as critical findings or narrowing the Standard 6 scope declaration.

findings.issue: Standard 6 CJK scan was applied too narrowly — hook files in scope were not scanned, yielding 4 missed CJK violations
findings.proposed_fix: Add critical findings for hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh:1233, hooks/pretool-bisect-gate.sh:24, hooks/pretool-git-privilege-guard.py:11, hooks/userprompt-consent-allowlist.sh:45
findings.rationale: Codex is correct that these are real Standard 6 violations and that hook files are in-scope for Standard 6. However, under --changed-files mode with AC-2.6(b) diff-overlap rule, these findings cannot be classified as 'provably NEW' violations — they are pre-existing and not in the diff. The Standard 6 unconditional-scan exception covers only agents/*.md and commands/*.md. Findings logged as advisory pre-existing violations rather than blocking violations for this diff cycle. They should be addressed in a full-repo scan cycle.

findings.issue: Mascot rank labels in agents/style-inspector.md:333 plausibly exempt
findings.rationale: Codex agreed with the exemption classification.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Hook-file CJK violations added to advisory_pre_existing section with diff_scope annotation. Not elevated to blocking violations because they are pre-existing and outside the --changed-files diff scope per AC-2.6(b).
